---
title: "Quoted in the *Associated Press* on crowdfunding for essential needs"
date: "2025-12-09"
categories: [media]
outlet: "Associated Press"
outlet_url: "https://apnews.com/article/gofundme-crowdfunding-affordability-99fa9ee7434f1ba8c714aa53f9cf99b8"
---

::: {.chips .entry-actions}
[Article](https://apnews.com/article/gofundme-crowdfunding-affordability-99fa9ee7434f1ba8c714aa53f9cf99b8){.chip title="Associated Press"}
:::

I was quoted in James Pollard's article, ["More people crowdfunded for essential needs like food and housing in 2025, according to GoFundMe,"](https://apnews.com/article/gofundme-crowdfunding-affordability-99fa9ee7434f1ba8c714aa53f9cf99b8) in the Associated Press, on the growth of crowdfunding for essential needs.
